name: mlp_md
intent: Reference path for machine-learning-potential-driven molecular dynamics studies with traceable sampling, labeling, dataset, training, validation, active-learning, and production-MD readiness evidence.
description: MLP-MD recipe guidance. It is not an executor DAG and does not add new top-level workflow stages.

artifact_metadata_conventions.toolchain_policy: Only vasp, cp2k, and lammps have built-in helper support. Other MLP tools are tracked for provenance and handoff unless a dedicated helper is added later.

recommended_checks: literature-backed MLP family and reference-label strategy recorded
sampling coverage and candidate-selection criteria documented
DFT label convergence and failed-label exclusions recorded
dataset split and source lineage preserved
training status and model artifact hashes recorded
validation metrics and long-MD smoke evidence recorded before production MD
uncertainty or anomaly criteria documented for active-learning backfill
handoff_notes: Record toolchain, iteration id, candidate pool, selected structures, label provenance, dataset split, training run, validation metrics, anomaly criteria, and production-MD gate decision.
